# Chess Tournament Calendar

> A calendar of classical (standard time control) chess tournaments from around the world. Tournament data is sourced from chess-results.com and updated automatically every 12 hours.

This site lists upcoming, open-entry classical chess tournaments, including dates, location, duration, and number of players registered. It excludes tournaments that have already started, non-Latin-alphabet tournament names, and rapid/blitz events.

## Pages

- [Tournament Calendar](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/): Full list of upcoming classical chess tournaments worldwide, filterable by country, month, and duration.
- [Contact & Feedback](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/contact): Send feedback, report issues, or enquire about tournament partnerships.

## Data

- [Tournament data (JSON)](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/data/tournaments.json): Machine-readable list of all tournaments. Updated every 12 hours.

## Details

Each tournament entry includes:
- Name and registration/info link
- Start and end dates
- City and country
- Duration in days
- Number of players currently registered (when available)

The page embeds structured data (schema.org Event, JSON-LD) for each tournament listed.
